Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0505 "CHUBBYGRISTLE-7000-0505" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $7000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Chubby Gristle.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $7000 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to start correctly.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
